debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
C : Error.Call n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
IH :
  ∀ (o : Error.maxOne n σ)
    (a_kv_b :
      Error.eval n S ⟨σ, o⟩
        (Error.Form.Neg n
          (Error.Form.Con n (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))))
            (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))))))),
    (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, o⟩
o : Error.maxOne n (C :: σ)
a_kv_b :
  Error.eval n S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩
    (Error.Form.Neg n
      (Error.Form.Con n (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))))
        (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))))))
ra : Error.roleOfIn n a C = Error.Role.Callee
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩

failed_attempts:
simp_all
                rw [this]
                cases h_b <;> simp_all
          all_goals
            sorry

apply stubbornness
                  simp
                aesop
          all_goals
            sorry

rw [this]
                have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
                simp_all
          all_goals
            sorry

· right
              rw [stubbornness _ ⟨σ,⁻o⟩ (by simp)]
              exact rfl
            · cases S b <;> simp_all
            · use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩
              simp
              use ⌜c a⌝
              simp
            · intro not_in_caller not_a_knows T τ same_len equ C role_C same_contrib
              cases h_b : S b
              all_goals
                simp_all
                have : T b = S b := by
                  have := know_self _ _ _ _ _ equ
                  simp_all
                simp_all
          all_goals
            contradiction

· have : (b, S b) ∈ resultSet b S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ := by
                rw [stubbornness _ ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl]
              exact Or.inr this
            · cases S b <;> simp_all
            · use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩
              simp
              use ⌜c a⌝
              simp
            · intro not_in_caller not_a_knows T τ same_len equ C role_C same_contrib
              cases h_b : S b
              all_goals
                simp_all
                have : T b = S b := by
                  have := know_self _ _ _ _ _ equ
                  simp_all
                simp_all
          all_goals
            contradiction

constructor
                · rfl
                · exact equiv_refl
          all_goals
            sorry
